title: Hedges and fences; specifications
doc_html:
§4875.  Hedges and fences; specifications

The police juries may regulate the height, and thickness, and may restrict the location of hedges and of fences constructed with posts and barbed wire.
doc_text:
§4875.  Hedges and fences; specifications
The police juries may regulate the height, and thickness, and may restrict the location of hedges and of fences constructed with posts and barbed wire.
